_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: three as NF1 deficient (JHH-136, JHH-520, JHH-1016B)...highest sensitivity in those with loss of NF1...Across all NF1-deficient neurospheres...decreased cell growth
